title: Tri Wealth Bracelet Set - Pyrite, Black Obsidian & Lava Stone
short_description: A coordinated set of three crystal bracelets - Pyrite, Black Obsidian and Lava Stone with a Hamsa charm - designed for prosperity, protection and grounded confidence. Wear one or stack all three.
body_html:
Bring together prosperity, protection and grounded confidence with the Tri Wealth Bracelet Set. This coordinated set includes three individually designed crystal bracelets featuring Pyrite, Black Obsidian, Lava Stone and a symbolic Hamsa Hand charm.

Each bracelet offers a different look while staying connected through a rich black and metallic colour palette. Wear one bracelet for a clean everyday statement or stack all three together for a bold, power-inspired wrist look.

The Set Includes

  • Richie Rich Dual Bead Bracelet - a minimal design of alternating Pyrite and glossy Black Obsidian beads, balancing prosperity with grounding.
  • Wealth Protection Lava Bracelet - a statement bracelet combining Pyrite, Black Obsidian and textured Lava Stone beads with metallic spacer accents.
  • Hamsa Wealth Shield Bracelet - Pyrite and Lava Stone beads finished with an antique Hamsa Hand charm for traditional protection.

Why Choose It

  • Three coordinated designs that can be worn separately, paired or stacked as a complete set.
  • Prosperity and protection combination - Pyrite is traditionally linked with abundance and confidence, Black Obsidian with grounding and protection.
  • Textured Lava Stone detailing that adds depth, character and a naturally bold appearance.
  • Symbolic Hamsa charm traditionally worn as a shield against nazar and unwanted energy.
  • Versatile black and metallic finish that complements casual, office, festive and evening outfits.
  • Flexible slip-on stretch construction - no clasp, easy everyday wear.

Crystal benefits are based on traditional beliefs and are not medical, professional or financial guarantees.
seo_title: Tri Wealth Bracelet Set - Pyrite, Obsidian & Lava
seo_description: Set of 3 crystal bracelets - Pyrite, Black Obsidian, Lava Stone & Hamsa charm. For prosperity, protection & grounding. Stack or wear solo. Free shipping over Rs 499.

metafields.highlights: Set of 3 coordinated crystal bracelets - Pyrite, Black Obsidian & Lava Stone with an antique Hamsa charm. For prosperity, protection and grounding. Flexible slip-on stretch fit; wear solo or stacked.
metafields.material_or_ingredients: Pyrite beads, Black Obsidian beads, natural Lava Stone beads, antique-finished Hamsa Hand charm, silver-toned metallic spacer accents, elastic stretch cord.
metafields.care_or_directions: Slip on gently over the hand; do not over-stretch the cord. Keep away from water, perfume and harsh chemicals. Wipe beads with a soft dry cloth. Store flat, away from direct heat.
metafields.shipping: Ships in 24 hrs · COD available · Free shipping over ₹499

faqs.q: What comes in the Tri Wealth Bracelet Set?
faqs.a: You receive three individually designed bracelets - the Richie Rich Dual Bead, the Wealth Protection Lava, and the Hamsa Wealth Shield - featuring Pyrite, Black Obsidian and Lava Stone beads plus a Hamsa charm.

faqs.q: Can I wear the bracelets separately?
faqs.a: Yes. Each bracelet is designed to look complete on its own. Wear one for a clean everyday look, pair two, or stack all three for a bold power-wrist stack.

faqs.q: Will these bracelets fit my wrist?
faqs.a: All three use a flexible stretch cord that slips on without a clasp and comfortably fits most standard wrist sizes.
Yes, the bracelets use natural Pyrite, Black Obsidian and Lava Stone beads. As with all natural stones, colour, texture and pattern vary slightly from piece to piece.

faqs.q: Do the crystals really bring wealth and protection?
faqs.a: Pyrite, Black Obsidian and Lava Stone are traditionally associated with prosperity, protection and grounding. These are based on traditional beliefs and are not medical, professional or financial guarantees.

faqs.q: How do I care for the bracelets?
faqs.a: Keep them away from water, perfume and chemicals, wipe with a soft dry cloth, and avoid over-stretching the cord so the beads stay securely arranged.

page_blocks.subtitle: Prosperity | Protection | Grounded Confidence
page_blocks.product_brief: The Tri Wealth Bracelet Set brings together three coordinated crystal bracelets in Pyrite, Black Obsidian and Lava Stone, finished with a symbolic Hamsa charm. Connected through one black-and-metallic colour story, they can be worn solo, paired or stacked. Designed for those who want to move towards growth while staying protected, focused and grounded.
page_blocks.what_we_put_in:
✦ Pyrite – the wealth crystal, traditionally linked with abundance, ambition and confidence
✦ Black Obsidian – the protection crystal, associated with grounding and shielding from negativity
✦ Lava Stone – the grounding element, adding raw texture, strength and stability
✦ Hamsa Hand Charm – an antique-finished symbol of protection against nazar
✦ Metallic Spacer Accents – silver-toned separators for a polished, premium finish
✦ Flexible Stretch Cord – keeps beads secure while allowing easy slip-on wear
page_blocks.product_benefits:
✨ Prosperity-inspired energy
Pyrite is traditionally associated with abundance, opportunity and confident action.
✨ Everyday protection
Black Obsidian and the Hamsa charm act as symbolic shields against negativity and nazar.
✨ Grounded and focused
Lava Stone adds stability, helping you stay calm and centred under pressure.
✨ Three looks in one set
Wear a single bracelet or stack all three for a bold, layered wrist look.
✨ Goes with everything
The neutral black-and-metallic palette suits casual, office, festive and evening outfits.
✨ Effortless fit
Slip-on stretch construction means no clasp and comfortable all-day wear.
page_blocks.product_details:
Base Metal: Alloy spacers & Hamsa charm
Stones: Pyrite, Black Obsidian, Lava Stone
Color: Black & Metallic
Finish: Polished beads with textured Lava Stone
Construction: Elastic slip-on stretch cord
Set: 3 bracelets
detail_points: 💰 Pyrite beads for prosperity and confident ambition
🛡️ Black Obsidian and Hamsa charm for protection from nazar
🌋 Textured Lava Stone for grounding and raw character
♾️ One flexible stretch fit worn solo, paired or stacked
page_blocks.product_specification:
Product Name: Tri Wealth Bracelet Set
Design: Set of 3 coordinated crystal bead bracelets with Hamsa charm
Material: Pyrite, Black Obsidian, Lava Stone, alloy spacers & charm, elastic cord
Net Quantity: 3 bracelets
Country of Origin: India
page_blocks.how_to_use:
1. Gently slip each bracelet over your hand onto the wrist without over-stretching the cord.
2. Wear one bracelet alone for a minimal look, or stack all three for a bold statement.
3. Set your intention - prosperity, protection or grounding - as you put them on.
4. Remove before bathing or swimming and wipe with a soft dry cloth after wear.
